article_title: Burnaby Council — 9.6. Attachment 1 - SU - Fire Department Status Report (Dec. 2025) 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby Fire Department Status Report for End of 2025
briefs.summary: Burnaby's Public Safety Committee is set to review the Fire Department's status report covering activity through December 2025. The report covers major incidents, call volume trends, fire prevention inspections, training hours, and community outreach — giving Council a picture of where fire service demands are growing.
briefs.action_required: If your business was inspected or flagged, watch for any follow-up from Burnaby Fire Prevention.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Food Service, Landlord & Property Mgmt
